name: magicinfo-performance-tests
description: K6 performance tests simulating 200 screens connecting to MagicInfo Server

scripts.test:smoke: k6 run --env ENV=smoke      --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/admin-user-simulation.js
scripts.test:enterprise: k6 run --env ENV=enterprise --env MAGICINFO_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7001 --env MAGICINFO_USERNAME=admin tests/scenarios/admin-user-simulation.js
